nasb.text: And they approached the village where they were going, and He acted as though He were going farther.

esv.text: So they drew near to the village to which they were going. He acted as if he were going farther,

cnv.text: 他們走近要去的村子，他好像還要往前行，

ccb.text: 快到以马忤斯村时，耶稣好像还要继续前行。

csbs.text: 他们快到要去的村子了，耶稣好像还要往前走。
